_publications._publicationTitle: Combined CDK4/6 and ERK1/2 Inhibition Enhances Antitumor Activity in NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: The results revealed increases in CDK6 (Fig. 2G, Supplemental Fig. S5B), CDK4 (Fig. 2H), phospho-Rb (S807/811) (Fig. 2I, Supplemental Fig. S5C)
details: Revealed increases in CDK6 in human PNF compared to healthy control nerve tissue by immunohistochemical assays
